mapper.select: SELECT e.emp_idx, e.emp_name, e.dept_name, e.position FROM employee e WHERE e.quitter = '입사' ORDER BY e.emp_name ASC

SELECT e.emp_idx, e.emp_name, e.dept_name, e.position, CASE WHEN w.worktype = '정상출근' THEN '출' WHEN w.worktype = '지각' THEN '지' WHEN w.worktype = '조퇴' THEN '조' WHEN w.worktype = '결근' THEN '결' WHEN w.worktype = '외근' THEN '외' WHEN w.worktype = '휴가' THEN '휴' ELSE '' END as attendance_status, DAY(w.start_date) as day FROM employee e LEFT JOIN worktype w ON e.emp_idx = w.emp_idx AND DATE_FORMAT(w.start_date, '%Y-%m') = CONCAT(#{year}, '-', LPAD(#{month}, 2, '0')) WHERE e.quitter = '입사' ORDER BY e.emp_name ASC, w.start_date ASC
